texto: I’m just being me… Success is more than just a wish or desire
autor: it’s a behavior. A byproduct of living this way is that I consistently draw the envy of haters while also disappointing those who have bet against me. But that’s just me… Unapologetically driven.
explicacao: Citação de it’s a behavior. A byproduct of living this way is that I consistently draw the envy of haters while also disappointing those who have bet against me. But that’s just me… Unapologetically driven. sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “I’m just being me… Success is more than just a wish or desire” articula reflexao, steve-maraboli, being em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
